hypothesis: For direct-force pretrained NNIPs, the Force Delta (root-mean-square difference between conservative forces −∇ĤE and directly predicted non-conservative forces ĤFnc) provides a data-free uncertainty estimate that correlates strongly with true force error (εdirect) on both equilibrium and adversarially perturbed out-of-distribution structures and identifies high-error configurations more effectively than per-family ensemble variance.
